title: Total supplement tax offsets 2012
description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, supplement, tax offsets, total tax offsets, supplement tax offsets

content_blocks.text: Did you claim any tax offsets at items T7, T8, T9, T10, T11 and T14?

rows: Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions

content_blocks.text: Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T7 , T8 , T9 , T10 , T11 and T14 on your tax return.
Write the amount from step 1 at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
Transfer the amount you wrote at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS to T on page 5 of your tax return.
We use the amounts at items T12 and T13 to work out your mature age worker and entrepreneurs tax offset entitlements. Do not include them at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS .

rows: Where to go next go to A4 - Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid . return to main menu Individual tax return instructions go back to T14 - Other tax offsets

content_text:
## Did you claim any tax offsets at items T7, T8, T9, T10, T11 and T14?
NO | Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions
YES | Go to step 1.
#### Step 1
Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T7 , T8 , T9 , T10 , T11 and T14 on your tax return.
#### Step 2
Write the amount from step 1 at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
#### Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS to T on page 5 of your tax return.
#### Step 4
Go to Total tax offsets .
We use the amounts at items T12 and T13 to work out your mature age worker and entrepreneurs tax offset entitlements. Do not include them at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS .
Where to go next go to A4 - Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid . return to main menu Individual tax return instructions go back to T14 - Other tax offsets
